risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: The project faces persistent high-level political and governance risks in Ethiopia that are constraining implementation progress. The overall ratings have declined from Moderately Satisfactory to Moderately Unsatisfactory, with Political and Governance risk maintained at High level.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High High

risk_title: Deteriorating Implementation Progress Despite Project Advancement
risk_summary: Despite 80% of the project being under implementation and expectation that all contracts will be signed by December 2025, the Overall Implementation Progress rating has declined from Moderately Satisfactory to Moderately Unsatisfactory, suggesting FCV-related obstacles are impeding execution despite technical progress.
evidence_quote: The project implementation has progressed in the last 6 months with 80% of the project under implementation... Overall Implementation Progress (IP) Moderately Satisfactory Moderately Unsatisfactory

risk_title: Declining Progress Toward Project Development Objectives
risk_summary: Progress toward achievement of the PDO has declined from Moderately Satisfactory to Moderately Unsatisfactory, indicating that FCV-related factors are hampering the project's ability to deliver on its core electricity access objectives despite ongoing implementation activities.
evidence_quote: Progress towards achievement of PDO Moderately Satisfactory Moderately Unsatisfactory
